problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Liquid. Liquid crystal elastomer actuation directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
